title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs · Eval Recall
summary: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a durable task state and handoff record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.
Store durable task details in files or structured summaries before context compaction.
Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for prompt long context that tests this competency: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Handoff Quality trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.

content.text: For Handoff Quality, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Handoff Quality precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed review case for prompt long context that tests this competency: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A list of edited filenames is a complete handoff.

stimulus.title: Handoff Quality case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for prompt long context that tests this competency: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A list of edited filenames is a complete handoff.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery. Artifact under review: a durable task state and handoff record.

options.text: The Handoff Quality record says a durable task state and handoff record looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Handoff Quality without its stated preconditions, omit the a durable task state and handoff record trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Handoff Quality for a durable task state and handoff record.
The record names the assumption, applies Handoff Quality, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
